# local-llm-mcp
> **Guides, best practices, and lessons learned for developing notepadpp-mcp** --- 📄 [AI_DEVELOPMENT_RULES.md](AI_DEVELOPMENT_RULES.md) **Guidelines for AI-assisted development** - Best practices for wo...

This project includes automated llms.txt generation for AI accessibility.

## Docs
- [Readme](docs\development\README.md): **Guides, best practices, and lessons learned for developing notepadpp-mcp**
- [Readme](docs\tool_calling\README.md): This document explains how to use the tool calling functionality in the LLM MCP server, which allows...
- [Readme](docs\glama-platform\README.md): **Complete guide to achieving and maintaining Gold Status on Glama.ai**
- [Readme](docs\notepadpp\README.md): **Everything you need to know about Notepad++ - from history to advanced usage**
- [Readme](docs\gradio\README.md): This document explains how to create interactive web interfaces for the LLM MCP server using Gradio.
- [Readme](README.md): A **production-ready** FastMCP 2.12+ compliant server for comprehensive LLM management and integrati...
- [Readme](docs\repository-protection\README.md): **Complete guide to keeping your notepadpp-mcp repository safe**
- [Readme](docs\lora\README.md): This document explains how to integrate and use LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) with the LLM MCP server f...
- [Readme](docs\integrations\README.md): This directory contains documentation and resources for integrating LLM MCP with various tools and p...
- [Readme](docs\mcpb-packaging\README.md): **Complete guide to packaging and distributing MCP servers with MCPB**

## Api
- [  Init  ](src\llm_mcp\api\v1\models\__init__.py): Api definitions and implementations
- [  Init  ](src\llm_mcp\api\v1\__init__.py): Api definitions and implementations
- [Mcp Servers](src\llm_mcp\api\v1\endpoints\mcp_servers.py): Api definitions and implementations
- [Mcp Servers](src\llm_mcp\api\v1\endpoints\mcp_servers.py): Endpoints definitions and implementations
- [Models](src\llm_mcp\api\v1\endpoints\models.py): Endpoints definitions and implementations
- [  Init  ](src\llm_mcp\api\v1\endpoints\__init__.py): Endpoints definitions and implementations
- [  Init  ](src\llm_mcp\api\v1\models\__init__.py): Models definitions and implementations
- [Models](src\llm_mcp\api\v1\endpoints\models.py): Models definitions and implementations
- [Models](src\llm_mcp\providers\vllm_v1\models.py): Models definitions and implementations
